task.description: Add Makefile target 'validate' that runs python3 -m py_compile on all Python scripts.

l1.content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add 'validate' target to Makefile that runs python3 -m py_compile on all Python scripts.",
  "target_files": ["Makefile"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "echo 'validate: python3 -m py_compile' >> Makefile",
    "echo '    python3 -m py_compile' >> Makefile",
    "echo '    python3 -m py_compile' >> Makefile"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'validate' Makefile",
    "grep -q 'py_compile' Makefile"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Makefile now contains 'validate' target that executes python3 -m py_compile on all Python scripts.",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure no unintended side effects on other targets or variables.",
  "follow_up_type": "none|needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add 'validate' target to Makefile that runs python3 -m py_compile on all Python scripts.
